sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4458" key="a)lloini/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλλοινία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n4458.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drinking severalwines, mixing liquors</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.661c</biblScope> </bibl>(pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
